texto: It has always been my belief that, for everyone who is ready and willing, there is a place. it seems to wait for him or her, in some good human cause. Causes are man-made, to be sure, and in the long run, I believe man can control the destiny of civilization on this earth. And yet I know that, beyond it all, there is an everlasting purpose, and within each one of us there is that lonely something that links us with Divinity. The link is there, to be used or disregarded. Each must make his own choice. p.117-118
explicacao: Orientação direta de Wilder Penfield sobre temas ligados a trabalho. A afirmação “It has always been my belief that, for everyone who is ready and willing, there is a place. it se…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, vida, work, útil em momentos de trabalho e work.
